title: Irish Rice Bowl
description: A simple and delicious bowl dish inspired by Irish cuisine, featuring tender rice and a savory kombu broth.
instructions: Bring 2 cups of pale vegetable broth to a boil in a medium saucepan.
Add the kombu pieces and simmer for 5 minutes.
Add the Irish rice and stir to combine. Reduce heat to low, cover, and cook for 15-20 minutes.
While the rice is cooking, heat the fried shallots in a small pan over medium heat.
Fluff the cooked rice with a fork and stir in the heated fried shallots.
Serve the rice in a bowl and garnish with chopped scallions if desired.
Discard the kombu pieces before serving.
